titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/231

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=190 status=live modified=2018-07-30 05:30:03.060227+00 | translation moa=191 status=live modified=2017-08-23 15:15:01.33183+00

div.p:
. M Rex Scott’ Omnibus probis hominibus tocius terre sue salutem. Sciant Clerici et laici me Concessisse
et hac presenti Carta confirmasse deo et ecclesie sancte crucis de edenesb’ et Canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus donacionem
illam quam . A . Comitissa mater mea eis fecit de uno tofto in karel et de redditu dimidiam marce de firma eiusdem uille annuatim
percipiendo . et de uno tofto in hadint’ Cum decima cum lucrorum et placidorum que proueniunt de hadint’scire . Tenend’ sibi et habend’
in liberam et perpetuam elemosinam . sicut carta . A . comitisse matris mee testatur . Testibus . Eng’ Cancellario . Walter filio alani Dapifero . Rob’
Auenel . Apud striuelyN

Malcolm king of Scots to all worthy men of the whole of his land sends greeting. Let the clerks and laymen know that I have granted and by this present charter made firm to God and to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh and to the canons serving God there the donation that Countess Ada my mother has made to them of one toft in Crail and of the rent of half a merk from the ferm of the same toun to be received yearly and of one toft in Haddington with the teind of the monies and pleas that come from the shire of Haddington. For them to hold and have in free and perpetual alms as the charter of Countess Ada my mother bears witness. As witnesses: Ingram the chancellor; Walter the steward son of Alan; Robert Avenel. At Stirling.
